title: Yennai Arindhaal Lyrics Yennai Arindhaal Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Yennai Arindhaal Song Lyrics From Yennai Arindhaal
Singers : Devan Ekambaram, Mark Thomas, Abhishek

Kedigaaram paarthal thavaru
Nodi mullaai muttum nagaru.
Kan paarththu pesapazhagu
Kadamaithaan endrum unaru.(2)

Miga paadhugaappaai
Veedu selvaar
Yennai adaindhaal.
Kondungolan ellaam
Petti paambu
Yennai Arindhaal.

Edai poda kallum illai
Edhirparkkum sollum illai.
Ivan yaaru endre solla
Uyirodu evanum illai.(2)

Maru pakkam marmam
Nilavukku mattum illaye.
Palaveru varrnam
Vaanavillil mattum illaye.

Oru podhum vandhu
Modha maattaai
Yennai Arindhaal .
Modhi paarkka aasaipattaal
Ayyo tholaindhaai.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Yennai Arindhaal?

The song conveys themes of self-awareness and resilience, reflecting the protagonist's journey in the movie.

What is the plot context of the movie Yennai Arindhaal?

The movie revolves around a police officer's struggles and his quest for justice, intertwined with personal relationships.

Who are the singers of Yennai Arindhaal?

The song features vocals by Abhishek, Devan Ekambaram, and Mark.

Who is the music director for Yennai Arindhaal?

The music for the song is composed by Harrish Jeyaraj.

When was Yennai Arindhaal released?

The song was released on January 1, 2015.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Yennai Arindhaal, the song encapsulates the essence of determination and strength, mirroring the protagonist's journey in the film. The energetic beats and motivational lyrics inspire listeners to overcome challenges and embrace their true selves. This vibrant melody serves as a perfect backdrop for moments of celebration and empowerment. The collaboration of talented singers adds depth to the song, making it a memorable piece in the soundtrack of Yennai Arindhaal.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Yennai Arindhaal is a vibrant anthem that showcases the powerful collaboration of Abhishek, Devan Ekambaram, and Mark, under the masterful direction of Harrish Jeyaraj. This song pulsates with energy and motivation, making it perfect for any celebration. Dive into the dynamic beats and uplifting lyrics that truly resonate with the spirit of the movie Yennai Arindhaal.
stanzaMeanings: If you see the trouble, don't ignore it. Look closely and speak wisely. Always remember to be careful.
If a mistake is made, it will run away.
In the eyes of the innocent, you have fallen.
If you are too protective, you will lose your home. If you find me, all the snakes will be in a box.
There is no stone to throw, and nothing to say in response. Who is this person? No one knows.
The secret on the other side is not just for the moon. Many colors are not just in the sky.
Just one moment can change everything. If you understand me, oh no, you have lost your way.
